name: New Algorithm Request
about: Suggest a new algorithm for Confluence
title: '[Algorithm] '

---

**Algorithm Name:** 

**Family:** (classification / regression / clustering / dim-reduction)

**sklearn class:** 

**Description:** 
What does this algorithm do? When should it be used?

**Why add this?** 
What educational value does it bring? What does it teach that existing algorithms don't?

**Hyperparameters to expose:** 
Which parameters should users be able to tune?

**Related algorithms:** 
How does it compare to algorithms already in Confluence?
